person_id.person_id: A unique identifier for each person in the dataset.

gender_concept_id.gender_concept_id: A standardized code representing the gender of the person.

year_of_birth.year_of_birth: The year in which the person was born.

month_of_birth.month_of_birth: The month in which the person was born.

day_of_birth.day_of_birth: The day of the month on which the person was born.

birth_datetime.birth_datetime: The exact date and time of the person's birth.

death_datetime.death_datetime: The exact date and time of the person's death, if applicable.

race_concept_id.race_concept_id: A standardized code representing the race of the person.

ethnicity_concept_id.ethnicity_concept_id: A standardized code representing the ethnicity of the person.

location_id.location_id: A unique identifier for the location associated with the person.

provider_id.provider_id: A unique identifier for the healthcare provider associated with the person.

care_site_id.care_site_id: A unique identifier for the care site where the person receives healthcare services.

person_source_value.person_source_value: The original value from the source system that represents the person.

gender_source_value.gender_source_value: The original value from the source system that represents the gender of the person.

gender_source_concept_id.gender_source_concept_id: A standardized code representing the gender of the person as recorded in the source system.

race_source_value.race_source_value: The original value from the source system that represents the race of the person.

race_source_concept_id.race_source_concept_id: A standardized code representing the race of the person as recorded in the source system.

ethnicity_source_value.ethnicity_source_value: The original value from the source system that represents the ethnicity of the person.

ethnicity_source_concept_id.ethnicity_source_concept_id: A standardized code representing the ethnicity of the person as recorded in the source system.

specimen_id.specimen_id: A unique identifier for each specimen record.

person_id.person_id: The unique identifier of the person from whom the specimen was collected.

specimen_concept_id.specimen_concept_id: A standardized code representing the type of specimen collected.

specimen_type_concept_id.specimen_type_concept_id: A standardized code representing the type of specimen, such as blood, tissue, or urine.

specimen_date.specimen_date: The date when the specimen was collected.

specimen_datetime.specimen_datetime: The date and time when the specimen was collected.

quantity.quantity: The amount or volume of the specimen collected.

unit_concept_id.unit_concept_id: A standardized code representing the unit of measurement for the quantity of the specimen.

anatomic_site_concept_id.anatomic_site_concept_id: A standardized code representing the anatomic site from which the specimen was collected.

disease_status_concept_id.disease_status_concept_id: A standardized code representing the disease status of the specimen, such as normal or diseased.

specimen_source_id.specimen_source_id: A unique identifier for the source of the specimen, such as a laboratory or hospital.

specimen_source_value.specimen_source_value: The original value or identifier of the specimen as recorded by the source.

unit_source_value.unit_source_value: The original unit of measurement for the quantity of the specimen as recorded by the source.

anatomic_site_source_value.anatomic_site_source_value: The original value or identifier for the anatomic site from which the specimen was collected as recorded by the source.

disease_status_source_value.disease_status_source_value: The original value or identifier for the disease status of the specimen as recorded by the source.

visit_occurrence_id.visit_occurrence_id: A unique identifier for each visit occurrence.
visit_occurrence_id.__table__: Visit occurrences with detailed information including dates, types, and related entities

person_id.person_id: The unique identifier for the person who had the visit.
person_id.__table__: Visit occurrences with detailed information including dates, types, and related entities

visit_concept_id.visit_concept_id: A standardized concept identifier for the type of visit (e.g., inpatient, outpatient).
visit_concept_id.__table__: Visit occurrences with detailed information including dates, types, and related entities

visit_start_date.visit_start_date: The date when the visit started.
visit_start_date.__table__: Visit occurrences with detailed information including dates, types, and related entities

visit_start_datetime.visit_start_datetime: The exact date and time when the visit started.
visit_start_datetime.__table__: Visit occurrences with detailed information including dates, types, and related entities

visit_end_date.visit_end_date: The date when the visit ended.
visit_end_date.__table__: Visit occurrences with detailed information including dates, types, and related entities

visit_end_datetime.visit_end_datetime: The exact date and time when the visit ended.
visit_end_datetime.__table__: Visit occurrences with detailed information including dates, types, and related entities

visit_type_concept_id.visit_type_concept_id: A standardized concept identifier for the type of visit occurrence (e.g., emergency, elective).
visit_type_concept_id.__table__: Visit occurrences with detailed information including dates, types, and related entities

provider_id.provider_id: The unique identifier for the provider who was responsible for the visit.
provider_id.__table__: Visit occurrences with detailed information including dates, types, and related entities

care_site_id.care_site_id: The unique identifier for the care site where the visit took place.
care_site_id.__table__: Visit occurrences with detailed information including dates, types, and related entities

visit_source_value.visit_source_value: The source code or value from the original data source that describes the visit.
visit_source_value.__table__: Visit occurrences with detailed information including dates, types, and related entities

visit_source_concept_id.visit_source_concept_id: A standardized concept identifier for the source code or value that describes the visit.
visit_source_concept_id.__table__: Visit occurrences with detailed information including dates, types, and related entities

admitted_from_concept_id.admitted_from_concept_id: A standardized concept identifier for the location or context from which the patient was admitted.
admitted_from_concept_id.__table__: Visit occurrences with detailed information including dates, types, and related entities

admitted_from_source_value.admitted_from_source_value: The source code or value from the original data source that describes the location or context from which the patient was admitted.
admitted_from_source_value.__table__: Visit occurrences with detailed information including dates, types, and related entities

discharge_to_concept_id.discharge_to_concept_id: A standardized concept identifier for the location or context to which the patient was discharged.
discharge_to_concept_id.__table__: Visit occurrences with detailed information including dates, types, and related entities

discharge_to_source_value.discharge_to_source_value: The source code or value from the original data source that describes the location or context to which the patient was discharged.
discharge_to_source_value.__table__: Visit occurrences with detailed information including dates, types, and related entities

preceding_visit_occurrence_id.preceding_visit_occurrence_id: The unique identifier for the visit occurrence that immediately preceded this one for the same person.
preceding_visit_occurrence_id.__table__: Visit occurrences with detailed information including dates, types, and related entities

visit_detail_id.visit_detail_id: A unique identifier for each visit detail record.

person_id.person_id: The unique identifier for the person associated with the visit detail.

visit_detail_concept_id.visit_detail_concept_id: A concept ID that categorizes the type of visit detail.

visit_detail_start_date.visit_detail_start_date: The date when the visit detail started.

visit_detail_start_datetime.visit_detail_start_datetime: The date and time when the visit detail started.

visit_detail_end_date.visit_detail_end_date: The date when the visit detail ended.

visit_detail_end_datetime.visit_detail_end_datetime: The date and time when the visit detail ended.

visit_detail_type_concept_id.visit_detail_type_concept_id: A concept ID that specifies the type of visit detail record.

provider_id.provider_id: The unique identifier for the provider who was responsible for the visit detail.

care_site_id.care_site_id: The unique identifier for the care site where the visit detail occurred.

visit_detail_source_value.visit_detail_source_value: The source value that describes the visit detail.

visit_detail_source_concept_id.visit_detail_source_concept_id: A concept ID that maps the source value to a standardized concept.

admitted_from_source_value.admitted_from_source_value: The source value that describes where the person was admitted from.

admitted_from_concept_id.admitted_from_concept_id: A concept ID that maps the admitted from source value to a standardized concept.

discharge_to_source_value.discharge_to_source_value: The source value that describes where the person was discharged to.

discharge_to_concept_id.discharge_to_concept_id: A concept ID that maps the discharge to source value to a standardized concept.

preceding_visit_detail_id.preceding_visit_detail_id: The unique identifier for the visit detail that occurred immediately before this one.

visit_detail_parent_id.visit_detail_parent_id: The unique identifier for the parent visit detail, if this visit detail is a sub-visit.

visit_occurrence_id.visit_occurrence_id: The unique identifier for the visit occurrence that this visit detail is part of.
